note: As-built (== intended design): the code-verified discovery flow (Part B) — the genuinely new system behaviour (scan → wire → verify each claim against code, code wins → record). The diagram held from phase ① and ships unchanged. Part A (the docs site) is static structure with nothing meaningful to draw beyond its nav; the site renders this same flow inline.

diagrams.title: Code-verified discovery: wire knowledge, then verify each claim against code (code wins)
